name: request-postcondition-emission
description: Verify that a storylet with RequestPostcondition emits a request to the pool
preconditions: DES simulation initialized with at least 1 Worker NPC; 'order_food' storylet loaded with RequestPostcondition
expectedOutcome: request_emitted event logged with type='food_delivery', urgency=0.7

steps.comment: Wait for first NPC to be created
Wait for initial sleep phase (wakeup event)
Advance game time ~2 minutes to trigger next storylet selection
Wait for node_arrival event when NPC transitions to next storylet
Verify request_emitted event appears after node_arrival (postcondition applied)
